title: [MTR4] Great British Railways | Southern Class 387 Electrostar
description: 387172's Great British Railways livery, brought to life in Minecraft Transit Railway!
body:
![Class 387 in Great British Railways passing a camera in the countryside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d0f0ac13ed4a092e9eb4b56c112a9c77bdbb132.png)

# Bored of Southern Rail's usual paintwork?
## Worry no longer, for the Great British Railways rendition is here!

Includes a Class 387 with First Class driving coach, Standard and Accessible trailers, and a Standard Class driving coach in Great British Railways | Southern livery.

All you require is Minecraft Transit Railway 4.0.0 or above!
